title: MCA § 30-1-101 - Short titles -- scope of chapter
text:
30-1-101. Short titles -- scope of chapter. (1) Chapters 1 through 9A and 12A of this title may be cited as Uniform Commercial Code.

(2) As used in chapters 1 through 9A and 12A of this title "code" means "Uniform Commercial Code" unless the context indicates otherwise.

(3) This chapter may be cited as the Uniform Commercial Code--General Provisions.

(4) This chapter applies to a transaction to the extent that it is governed by chapters 2 through 5, 7, 8, 9A, and 12A of this title.

(5) Nothing in chapters 1 through 9A and 12A of this title may be construed to support, endorse, create, or implement a national digital currency.

History: History: En. Sec. 1-101, Ch. 264, L. 1963; amd. Sec. 12, Ch. 265, L. 1977; R.C.M. 1947, 87A-1-101; amd. Sec. 1, Ch. 575, L. 2005; amd. Sec. 1, Ch. 200, L. 2025.
chapter: CHAPTER 1. UNIFORM COMMERCIAL CODE GENERAL PROVISIONS
part: Part 1. Short Title, Construction, Application, and Subject Matter of the Code
